---
title: "S5 — Linux and HPC"
sidebar: slides
---

```{=html}
<div class="slide-embed-card">

  <div class="slide-embed-header">
    <span class="slide-embed-title">Introducton to Linux and HPC</span>
    <div class="slide-embed-actions">
      <a class="slide-embed-btn"
         href="linux_hpc_intro.html"
         target="_blank" rel="noopener"
         title="Open slides in new browser tab">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M3.75 2h3.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-3.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v8.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h8.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-3.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v3.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 12.25 14h-8.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 2 12.25v-8.5C2 2.784 2.784 2 3.75 2Zm6.854-1h4.146a.25.25 0 0 1 .25.25v4.146a.25.25 0 0 1-.427.177L13.03 4.03 9.28 7.78a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042l3.75-3.75-1.543-1.543A.25.25 0 0 1 10.604 1Z"/></svg>
        Open in new tab
      </a>
      <button class="slide-embed-btn"
              onclick="document.getElementById('frame-github-intro').requestFullscreen()"
              title="Fullscreen">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M1.75 10a.75.75 0 0 1 .75.75v2.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-2.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 1 13.25v-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 .75-.75Zm12.5 0a.75.75 0 0 1 .75.75v2.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 13.25 15h-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.5h2.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 .75-.75ZM2.75 2.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v2.5a.75.75 0 0 1-1.5 0v-2.5C1 1.784 1.784 1 2.75 1h2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5ZM10 1.75a.75.75 0 0 1 .75-.75h2.5C14.216 1 15 1.784 15 2.75v2.5a.75.75 0 0 1-1.5 0v-2.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25h-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1-.75-.75Z"/></svg>
        Fullscreen
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <iframe
    id="frame-linux-intro"
    class="slide-embed-frame"
    src="linux_hpc_intro.html"
    allowfullscreen
    loading="lazy"
    title="Linux Introduction slides">
  </iframe>

  <div class="slide-embed-footer">
    <span>Navigate: <kbd>→</kbd> next &nbsp;·&nbsp; <kbd>←</kbd> prev &nbsp;·&nbsp; <kbd>F</kbd> fullscreen &nbsp;·&nbsp; <kbd>Esc</kbd> exit &nbsp;·&nbsp; <kbd>S</kbd> speaker notes</span>
  </div>

</div>
```
